Notice Of Motion And Motion" 1) To Compel Objectionless Answers To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set-One); 2) For Monetary Sanctions; And 3) For Issue Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF JAMES JOSEPH BAILEY'S Motions 1) To Compel Objectionless Answers To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set-One); 2) For Monetary Sanctions; And 3) For Issue Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice -- No oral argument allowed pursuant to Local Rule 8.14(d). Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to interrogatories: denied (see CRC 335). Plaintiff's motion for monetary sanctions: denied. Plaintiff's motion for issue sanctions: denied. Request for judicial notice: granted to the extent it requests court to acknowledge existence of documents in its own file; denied to the extent it requests court to consider truth of assertion contained in those documents. (301/JLW/SL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

To Establish Truth Of Facts; To Compel Further Response; For Expenses On Refusal To Admit; And Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-17-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF JAMES BAILEY'S Motion To Establish Truth Of Facts; To Compel Further Response; For Expenses On Refusal To Admit; And Request For Judicial Notice -- Motion for matters to be deemed admitted: Denied. Motion to compel further responses: Denied, see CRC 335(C)(3). Request for issue, terminating and monetary sanctions: Denied. No oral argument pursuant to 8.14D(2)(a). (301/JLW/SL) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

APPEARANCES:
Jesse C. Ralph, Esq., 776-1826, for plaintiff James Bailey moving (1) to compel Objectionless Answers To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set-One); 2) For Monetary Sanctions; And 3) For Issue Sanctions

RULING:
Counsel for plaintiff notified the Court of his objection to the tentative ruling and his objection to Discovery Commissioners. Pursuant to S. F. Local Rule 8.14(d)(2), the Court continued hearing on PLAINTIFF JAMES BAILEY'S Motion 1) To Compel Objectionless Answers To Pltf'S Form Interrogatories (Set-One); 2) For Monetary Sanctions; And 3) For Issue Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice to September 9, 2003. Plaintiff is to give notice for the continued hearing date. (KMM/301) Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
